tasks.subject: Task 0: Database Schema & Shared Types
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add `long_text` to the message type enum at DB and TypeScript levels.

**Files:**
- Modify: `apps/server/libs/database/src/schemas/im/messages.ts:16-22`
- Create: `apps/server/libs/database/migrations/0033_long_text_message_type.sql`
- Modify: `apps/server/libs/shared/src/types/message.types.ts:46-55,235-265`
- Modify: `apps/server/libs/shared/src/events/domains/message.events.ts:12`
- Modify: `apps/client/src/types/im.ts:4,152-184`

**Verify:** `pnpm db:migrate && pnpm build:server`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps/server/libs/database/src/schemas/im/messages.ts", "apps/server/libs/shared/src/types/message.types.ts", "apps/server/libs/shared/src/events/domains/message.events.ts", "apps/client/src/types/im.ts", "apps/server/apps/gateway/src/im/messages/messages.service.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm db:migrate && pnpm build:server", "acceptanceCriteria": ["messageTypeEnum includes long_text", "Migration SQL adds enum value", "All TS type unions include long_text", "pnpm db:migrate runs cleanly"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Server Configuration & Limits
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Raise payload size limits for Express body parser, Socket.io, and gRPC to support 100K char messages.

**Files:**
- Modify: `apps/server/apps/gateway/src/main.ts:36`
- Modify: `apps/server/apps/gateway/src/im/websocket/websocket.gateway.ts:66-75`
- Modify: `apps/server/apps/gateway/src/im/services/im-worker-grpc-client.service.ts:99-110`
- Modify: `apps/server/apps/im-worker/src/main.ts:24-39`

**Verify:** `pnpm build:server`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps/server/apps/gateway/src/main.ts", "apps/server/apps/gateway/src/im/websocket/websocket.gateway.ts", "apps/server/apps/gateway/src/im/services/im-worker-grpc-client.service.ts", "apps/server/apps/im-worker/src/main.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm build:server", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Express JSON body limit 1MB", "Socket.io maxHttpBufferSize 1MB", "gRPC client/server max message 4MB"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: DTO Validation & Type Detection Logic
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Raise MaxLength to 100000, implement determineMessageType() and countLogicalLines(), wire into creation and edit flows.

**Files:**
- Modify: `apps/server/apps/gateway/src/im/messages/dto/create-message.dto.ts:36`
- Modify: `apps/server/apps/gateway/src/im/messages/dto/update-message.dto.ts:5`
- Create: `apps/server/apps/gateway/src/im/messages/message-utils.ts`
- Modify: `apps/server/apps/gateway/src/im/messages/messages.controller.ts:147`
- Modify: `apps/server/apps/gateway/src/im/messages/messages.service.ts`
- Modify: `apps/server/apps/im-worker/src/message/message.grpc-controller.ts:88,103`
- Test: `apps/server/apps/gateway/src/im/messages/messages.service.spec.ts`

**Verify:** `cd apps/server && pnpm jest --testPathPattern=messages.service.spec`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps/server/apps/gateway/src/im/messages/message-utils.ts", "apps/server/apps/gateway/src/im/messages/dto/create-message.dto.ts", "apps/server/apps/gateway/src/im/messages/dto/update-message.dto.ts", "apps/server/apps/gateway/src/im/messages/messages.controller.ts", "apps/server/apps/gateway/src/im/messages/messages.service.ts", "apps/server/apps/im-worker/src/message/message.grpc-controller.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps/server && pnpm jest --testPathPattern=messages.service.spec", "acceptanceCriteria": ["MaxLength 100000 on both DTOs", "Messages >=20 lines OR >=2000 chars get long_text", "Line counting handles HTML and Markdown", "Edit re-determines type", "IM Worker accepts long_text"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Truncation & Full Content API
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Implement truncateForPreview() in MessagesService, apply to broadcast/list endpoints, add GET /messages/:id/full-content endpoint.

**Files:**
- Modify: `apps/server/apps/gateway/src/im/messages/messages.service.ts`
- Modify: `apps/server/apps/gateway/src/im/messages/messages.controller.ts`
- Test: `apps/server/apps/gateway/src/im/messages/messages.service.spec.ts`

**Verify:** `cd apps/server && pnpm jest --testPathPattern=messages.service.spec`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps/server/apps/gateway/src/im/messages/message-utils.ts", "apps/server/apps/gateway/src/im/messages/messages.service.ts", "apps/server/apps/gateway/src/im/messages/messages.controller.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps/server && pnpm jest --testPathPattern=messages.service.spec", "acceptanceCriteria": ["truncateForPreview truncates at 20 lines OR 3000 chars", "Sets isTruncated and fullContentLength", "GET /messages/:id/full-content with auth", "Truncation applied to WS broadcast and list endpoints"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Client API & Cache Integration
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add getFullContent() API call, useFullContent hook, invalidate cache on message_updated, pre-send length validation.

**Files:**
- Modify: `apps/client/src/services/api/im.ts`
- Modify: `apps/client/src/hooks/useMessages.ts`

**Verify:** `pnpm build:client`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps/client/src/services/api/im.ts", "apps/client/src/hooks/useMessages.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm build:client", "acceptanceCriteria": ["getFullContent API method exists", "useFullContent hook with staleTime Infinity", "Cache invalidated on message_updated", "Sends over 100K chars blocked with error"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: LongTextCollapse Component & MessageContent Integration
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create LongTextCollapse component with gradient fade-out, expand button, full-content fetching. Integrate into MessageContent.

**Files:**
- Create: `apps/client/src/components/channel/LongTextCollapse.tsx`
- Create: `apps/client/src/components/channel/__tests__/LongTextCollapse.test.tsx`
- Modify: `apps/client/src/components/channel/MessageContent.tsx`
- Modify: `apps/client/src/components/channel/MessageItem.tsx`

**Verify:** `cd apps/client && pnpm vitest run --testPathPattern=LongTextCollapse`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps/client/src/components/channel/LongTextCollapse.tsx", "apps/client/src/components/channel/__tests__/LongTextCollapse.test.tsx", "apps/client/src/components/channel/MessageContent.tsx", "apps/client/src/components/channel/MessageItem.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps/client && pnpm vitest run --testPathPattern=LongTextCollapse", "acceptanceCriteria": ["~10 lines with gradient fade-out", "展开全文 button with remaining char count", "In-place expand with no network if not truncated", "Fetch full-content if truncated", "Error state with retry"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: End-to-End Verification & Error Feedback
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Verify full flow end-to-end, add error toast on send failure, run full build.

**Files:**
- Modify: `apps/client/src/hooks/useMessages.ts` (onError handler)

**Verify:** `pnpm build`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps/client/src/hooks/useMessages.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["5000-char message creates long_text type", "Collapsed message with expand button", "Expand works without network for moderate messages", "Error toast on send failure", "Full build passes"]}
```
